summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected; hydrated open PRs are classified independently unless live preflight data was unavailable, and no GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Open focused PR, but blocked from merge/close by dirty state and failing proof; keep as independent backlog item.
Independent implementation PR needing proof/review; no close or merge action is safe in plan mode.
Independent process-supervisor fix candidate, but conflicts/check failures block any stronger recommendation.
Draft, proof-failing provider fix should remain independent; no closure or merge path is available.
Maintainer-owned broad docs/contracts PR needs maintainer judgment rather than inventory automation classification alone.
Small independent PR with missing proof/template detail; low-signal closure is not allowed by this job.
Independent Android bugfix candidate; proof gap blocks stronger action.
Maintainer-owned draft with successful proof needs maintainer decision; no automated close/merge is allowed.
Independent small cleanup PR; proof failure prevents merge/fixed-by classification.
Independent agents fix candidate; review/proof/check gaps block merge or closeout.
Ready-looking independent feature PR, but dirty state and blocked merge action keep this as non-mutating classification.
Independent outbound fix candidate; proof/review gaps block merge or fixed-by closeout.
Live preflight state is unavailable from the artifact, so classification requires rehydration before any actionable recommendation.
Independent plugin feature candidate with proof/review gaps; no close, merge, or security route is justified from hydrated data.
Independent fix candidate that may merit maintainer review, but inventory worker should not merge or close it.
Needs rehydration before classification because live state is missing from the artifact.
Needs rehydration before classification because live state is missing from the artifact.

Needs rehydration before classification because live state is missing from the artifact.

Independent UI feature PR needing review/proof follow-up; no closure condition applies.

Independent fix candidate that should remain available for maintainer review.

needs_human: #89426 requires maintainer judgment because it is maintainer-labeled, broad, dirty, and not a dedupe/close candidate.
#89463 requires maintainer judgment because it is maintainer-owned draft work with successful proof.
#39386 requires maintainer/author follow-up because it is draft maintainer work with failing proof and a recorded review concern.
#92959, #92957, #92963, #92933, and #92939 need rehydration because the compacted preflight artifact omitted live item entries and target_updated_at values.
